headline: Is Prologis (PLD) Pricing Look Stretched After Recent Share Price Swings
summary: If you are wondering whether Prologis at around US$134 per share still offers value, this article will walk through how that price stacks up against several common valuation checks. The stock has recently been mixed, with a 5.6% decline over the last 7 days and a 1.8% decline over 30 days, while the year to date return sits at 4.3% and the 1 year return at 16.2%. These moves come as investors continue to weigh broader sentiment around logistics and industrial real estate, which can influence...
